name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature for TomoImageStitcher
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?

A clear and concise description of what the problem is.

## Describe the solution you'd like

What you would like TomoImageStitcher to do.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or features you have considered.

## Use case

A real-world example of how you would use the feature.

## Additional context

Screenshots, links, code snippets — anything that helps.
